column1: Payment details --> Exceeding card numbers limits without validation
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to payment screen
2- add 24 number in the card number field (allowed is 16)
3- Select valid travel data
4- Click pay now

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message says card number shouldn’t exceed 16 numbers

*Actual Result:*

The system proceeded without showing any error message

column1: Payment details --> Adding special characters to card holder name without validation
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to passenger details screen
2- add special characters to last name
4- Click next

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message and prevent proceeding 

*Actual Result:*

The system proceed to payment page without showing any error message

column1: Flight Booking --> Return date is earlier than departure date without validation
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to flight booking screen
2- Select Return date to be earlier than departure date

3- Select valid travel data 
4- Click continue

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message and prevent proceeding when Return data is earlier than departure date

*Actual Result:*

The system allowed booking with Return data is earlier than departure date and proceeded without showing any error message

column1: Flight Booking --> Same origin and destination allowed without validation
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to flight booking screen
2- Select the same city for both origin and destination
3- Select valid travel date(s)
4- Click continue

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message and prevent proceeding when origin and destination are the same

*Actual Result:*

The system allowed booking with the same origin and destination and proceeded without showing any error message

column1: Flight Booking --> Past departure date accepted without validation
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to flight booking screen
2- Select a departure date in the past
3- Fill other required fields with valid data
4- Click continue

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message and prevent proceeding when departure date is in the past

*Actual Result:*

The system accepted a past departure date and proceeded to the passenger details page without showing any error message

column1: Flight Selection --> Multiple flight selection allowed without validation
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to flight selection screen

2- Providing valid data
3- Select more than one flight at the same time
4- Click continue

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message and prevent proceeding when multiple flights are selected

*Actual Result:*

The system allowed selecting multiple flights and proceeded to the passenger details page without showing any error message

column1: Responsive UI --> Content aligned to top leaving excessive empty space on screen
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Open the application on a mobile device or resize the browser to a responsive view
2- Navigate through different screens (e.g., flight selection, passenger details, payment)
3- Observe the layout and content positioning

*Expected Result:*

The system should display content properly distributed across the screen, utilizing available space and ensuring readability and usability

*Actual Result:*

Most of the screen remains empty (~80%), while all content is compressed at the top, making it difficult to read and interact with the application

column1: Passenger Details --> Last name field accepts numeric values instead of letters only
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Go to passengers detail after selecting a flight with a valid details

2- Enter a numeric value in the last name field

3- Fill the first name with a valid name

4- click next

*Expected Result:*

The system should present an error message and prevent proceeding when last name contains numeric values

*Actual Result:*

The system accepted numeric values in the last name field and proceeding without leaving an error message

column1: No error messages appear when leaving 'From' or 'To' fields empty
column26:
*Step to reproduce:*

1- Open Book flight page

2- Leave From and To fields empty

3- Fill other fields with valid data

4- Click continue

*Expected Result:*

The booking shouldn’t complete and an error message should appear

*Actual Result:*

The Booking is proceeded and no error message appeared

column1: Booking -> User can't return back to Booking page
column26:
h3. Impact

Users are unable to return to the Booking page after completing a flight booking. This prevents them from booking additional flights.

h3. Expected behaviour

Users should be able to return to the Booking page to book a new flight after completing a previous booking.

h3. Actual behaviour

Users get stuck on the flight information page and cannot go back to book a new flight.

h3. Steps to reproduce

* Login as a valid user
* Book a flight with valid data
* Pay for the flight

h3. Environment

N/A

h3. Workarounds

N/A

h3. Other information

N/A
